atomic_facts.fact: The video transitions from a black title card to a wide shot of a city street.

Traffic, including white vans and auto-rickshaws, moves along the curved road.
Pedestrians are visible walking near the road and buildings.

spatial: The title text is centered on the black background in the first frame. In the second frame, the mosque is located in the background to the left of the center. The road curves through the center of the scene, with vehicles driving on it. The pedestrians are positioned on the sidewalks and near the road, in front of the buildings.
state_changes: Scene transitions from title card to live action with moving vehicles and pedestrians.
